title: 1,000 AI agents, 0 LLM calls?
summary: A technique for scaling AI agents by replacing LLM calls with deterministic logic and route planning algorithms. The approach uses a before_model_callback mechanism to avoid unnecessary model invocations while maintaining agent behavior, demonstrated with 1,000 agents executing with zero LLM calls.
